title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 32.059 - Contracts prohibiting agents from employing lobbyists not binding and prohibited
text:
32.059.  Contracts prohibiting agents from employing lobbyists not binding and prohibited. — Any other provision of the law to the contrary notwithstanding, no contractual provision between the department of revenue and its agents which prohibits said agent from employing a lobbyist shall be binding on said agent, and no subsequent contract shall contain such a provision.
(L. 1997 H.B. 459 § 1)
